_comment: Copy this file to profile.json and fill in YOUR details.
The tailor.py script reads profile.json and generates a tailored CV and
cover letter for any job in data/jobs.json. No LaTeX editing required.
All LaTeX special characters (\, &, %, $, #, _, ~, ^) are auto-escaped
from your strings when they are written into the CV/CL, so you can type
natural text without worrying about backslashes.

identity._what: Your contact details. These appear in the CV header and cover letter signoff.
identity.full_name: Your Full Name (as it should appear on the CV)

core_competencies._what: 4-6 short skill-area cards. Each is one bullet in the CV's 'Core Competencies' section. Use plain text (the script wraps it in LaTeX bold + body).

_example.label: Frontend (React/Next.js)
_example.body: React 18/19, Next.js, TypeScript -- component-driven accessible interfaces for SaaS dashboards.

_example.label: Backend
_example.body: Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, Docker -- supporting full-stack feature delivery.

experience._what: Work history, newest first. Most recent job is index 0. Each entry has 2-5 bullets of what you did and the impact.

_example.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Led the migration of a legacy React app to Next.js, cutting page load by 60%.
Built an internal design system adopted by 5 product teams.

publications._what: Optional. One short string per publication or notable open-source project.

_example.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

languages._what: Languages you speak, with proficiency level.

awards._what: Awards, hackathons, recognitions. Wrap the title in ** for bold.
